regional_cost_note: Electricians in Dunedin typically charge $75–$90/hr plus GST, slightly below Auckland and Wellington rates. Standard callout fees run $80–$120. Emergency and after-hours callouts add $100–$180 on top of the hourly rate.

businesses.name: Sam I Am Electrical
businesses.known_for: Owner-operated by Sam Katuszka with 18+ years experience; known for personal service, transparent communication, and tidy workmanship on residential and small commercial jobs.

businesses.name: Honest Electrical Limited
businesses.known_for: Full-service domestic electrician covering wiring, switchboard upgrades, EV charger installation, data cabling, ventilation, and safety inspections with 15+ years in the trade.

businesses.name: Leading Electrical Dunedin
businesses.known_for: Specialists in heritage home electrical upgrades and renovations; deep experience handling the practical challenges of century-old Dunedin villas where other electricians struggle to quote.

businesses.name: Whitburn Electrical
businesses.known_for: 24/7 availability for residential and commercial clients, specialising in insurance rewiring, heat pump installations, and electrical maintenance for rental properties.

businesses.name: Active Electro Dunedin Ltd
businesses.known_for: Covering the wider Dunedin region with 24/7 emergency availability for residential and commercial electrical repairs and new installations.

businesses.name: Tansley Electrical
businesses.known_for: Award-winning firm with 60+ years of Dunedin history; handles large commercial, industrial, and heritage projects across Dunedin, Queenstown, and Invercargill.

businesses.name: McArthur & Symons Electrical
businesses.known_for: Family-owned business established in 1977; expert in residential and commercial work including heat pumps, data cabling, appliance testing, and 24/7 emergency callouts.

businesses.name: A1 Electrical Contractors
businesses.known_for: Serving the wider Dunedin region since 2006 with professional domestic and commercial electrical services; praised for fast, professional service and sound advice.

businesses.name: Dunedin Electricians Ltd
businesses.known_for: Swift residential and commercial electrical solutions across Otago, handling a broad range of installation, repair, and fault-finding work.
